---
id: pay-an-invoice-custom-action
title: "Pay an invoice (custom action)"
description: "Loads the invoice, calls the `pay` custom action delegate, then persists changes. Defined via `.CustomAction('pay', handler)` in `InvoiceSetup.Configure`."
sidebar_label: "Pay an invoice (custom action)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/head-net-sample-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Pay an invoice (custom action)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/invoices/{id}/pay"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Loads the invoice, calls the `pay` custom action delegate, then persists changes. Defined via `.CustomAction("pay", handler)` in `InvoiceSetup.Configure`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
